ignore-list.label: Ignore Users
ignore-list.description: The bot will ignore any users in this list. Recommended to put your other bots in this list.

command.description: The bot will reply to messages that start with this command.
command.label: Command

reply.description: The bot's reply to the above command.
reply.label: Reply

allowed-roles.description: Users must have one of these roles to use this command.
allowed-roles.label: Allowed Roles

follow-age.description: Will only reply to followers that have followed for at least this many hours.
follow-age.label: Follow Age (hours)

user-cooldown.description: Time before this command can be used again by the same user.
user-cooldown.label: User Cooldown (seconds)

global-cooldown.description: Time before any user can use this command again.
global-cooldown.label: Global Cooldown (seconds)

aliases.description: Also replies if the message starts with these alternatives.
aliases.label: Aliases

keywords.description: Also replies if these words appear anywhere in the message.
keywords.label: Keywords
